title: angelica scabrida
intro: Angelica scabrida is a perennial plant species native to China and Southeast Asia, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antispasmodic properties, which help in relieving pain, reducing fever, and calming the nervous system. The health benefits of Angelica scabrida include its ability to alleviate menstrual cramps, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal medicine, Angelica scabrida is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or decoction to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
